title: Bright Day
lyrics: Okay, now listen Cletus, we're gonna have to get together here because your whole entire viewpoint on the world is a little mixed, okay? What you don't understand is that we're all like mothafucka. Not just one little person over here, we're all the like mothafucka. Now come on. Come in. Ciao. Mothafucka, ciao. It feels good to feel good. So feel good with me, yeah. Hakuna Matata. No worries, yesterday be our guest. This is what we come to you. I just, and just, and just, and just, and just. Oh yeah. I know you wanna be happy even if you're sad. Oh baby, baby. I know you want life. I know you wanna be alright. And I know it's not bad to dream a little bit, dream with me. I know it gets savage sometimes, you know. You see that girl you want and she's like nah, nah, nah, nah, nah, nah, nah, not today. Gets a little rough, but you dress yourself up, come back tough. That's right, because there's a different person waiting for you. It's all about the soul, and it's all about the challenge. Not having you feel good inside of your own bed. When you keep mixing all up, and you bake your own brain into what you wanna be. I'm telling you. Hakuna Matata. Remember that with me. It means no worries for the rest of your day, because you love you. You see. Baby, now we're dancing. On the ceiling, family everywhere. Now we're doing it on top of you know where. Come on down. Light them up. Come on down. Vibrate them up. Come on down. You're the wonder man, baby. We're making history. There's another one of me. There's another one of you. Another one of you. There's another one of me. That's what makes the whole thing. Together come together. Be family. Be family with me. Here we go left, here we go right. We'll just figure it out. All through the day. All through the night. I am not dancing alone. I love the stereo sound. I can grow in love with all the thoughts around me. It feels so good to be alive. Come and dance with me down the history of our own divides. Self split. Self split.
